result.stderr:
ConfigComparer 1.0.1
Copyright (C) 2026 ConfigComparer
USAGE:
Compare two folders:
  config-comparer c:\project-a c:\project-b appsettings.json
  appsettings.Production.json
Compare two folders. Show only differences:
  config-comparer --skip-same c:\project-a c:\project-b appsettings.json
  appsettings.Production.json
Compare two folders. Show only differences and hide real values:
  config-comparer --no-values --skip-same c:\project-a c:\project-b
  appsettings.json appsettings.Production.json

  -s, --skip-same    If set, only non-equal configuration is printed.

  -n, --no-values    If set, values are not shown.

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.

  value pos. 0       Required. Path to the left compare directory with JSON
                     config files.

  value pos. 1       Required. Path to the right compare directory with JSON
                     config files.

  value pos. 2       List of config files to read (for example: appsettings.json
                     appsettings.Production.json)

values.name: leftdirectory
values.description: Path to the left compare directory with JSON config files.

values.name: rightdirectory
values.description: Path to the right compare directory with JSON config files.

values.name: files
values.description: List of config files to read (for example: appsettings.json appsettings.Production.json)

options.description: If set, values are not shown.
If set, only non-equal configuration is printed.
